title: Gate 13: Fellowship
description: You are built to listen and hold others' stories without judgment. People naturally trust you with their truths and histories. You are a witness — and your compassionate attention transforms the people who feel truly seen by you.
learningGoal: The viewer understands what Gate 13 (Fellowship — The Fellowship of Shared Stories) means in their daily life, in plain terms.
keyPoints: You are built to listen and hold others' stories without judgment.
People naturally trust you with their truths and histories.
and your compassionate attention transforms the people who feel truly seen by you.
forbiddenClaims: a gate guarantees a talent you do not have to develop
gates rank people as better or worse
an activated gate forces a fixed behaviour

variants.angleNote: THE GIFT — what this gives you. Recognition, the quiet power of it. Make them feel seen.
variants.hook: Gate 13: Fellowship — the part most people miss.
variants.participationPrompt: Does this land? Drop a ✦ if this is you.

variants.angleNote: THE SHADOW — the not-self trap, the misalignment signal to watch for. Honest, never fearful.
variants.hook: Gate 13: Fellowship — the trap nobody warns you about.
variants.participationPrompt: Caught yourself here before? Tell me where.

variants.angleNote: THE PRACTICE — one concrete move for today. Action-oriented, motion-forward, doable now.
variants.participationPrompt: Try it today. Come back and tell me what shifted.

variants.angleNote: THE MIRROR — how this shows up with other people. The relational lens.
variants.hook: Gate 13: Fellowship — why it changes every room you enter.
variants.participationPrompt: Who in your life does this explain? Tag the feeling.

toneNotes: Oracle/sage register: warm, recognition-based, unhurried, mythic but grounded. Speak directly to the viewer. No jargon, no hype, no fear.

output_metadata.title: Gate 13: Fellowship — Your Energy Blueprint
output_metadata.description: You are built to listen and hold others' stories without judgment. People naturally trust you with their truths and histories. You are a witness — and your compassionate attention transforms the people who feel truly seen by you.
